title: Biden proposes debating Trump twice. He wants the first one in June.
shortDescription: President Joe Biden proposed debating Donald Trump twice before the general election — with the first match in June before the start of early voting.

title: 'They should all be executed.' Trump's attacks on judges spur calls for violence
shortDescription: Trump's broadsides have unleashed a torrent of violent comments from his fans on Truth Social and other sites, experts say.

title: Trump's fast-spreading election doubts raise concerns for Jan. 6, 2025
shortDescription: In 2020, elected officials pushed back when Trump said he might not accept the election results. Now a new set of leaders are echoing his rhetoric.

title: Trump wins Nebraska primary, but Nikki Haley continues to get votes
shortDescription: The former president wins Nebraska GOP primary; surprise as ex-candidate Nikki Haley garners a notable share of the vote.

title: Joe Biden triumphs in Nebraska's Democratic primary
shortDescription: Joe Biden won Nebraska's 2024 Democratic primary, securing the win with significant competition.

title: Rep. Don Bacon fends off GOP hardliner to win Nebraska primary
shortDescription: Bacon will go on to face Democratic state Sen. Tony Vargas, whom he beat by less than two points in 2022.

title: State election gets confusing: Two identically-named candidates withdraw from race in WA
shortDescription: Two Bob Ferguson's joined and quickly dropped out of Washington's race for Governor after threats of legal action from state Attorney General Bob Ferguson.

title: What Michael Cohen said at Donald Trump's trial and what it means
shortDescription: Michael Cohen delivered testimony crucial to the prosecution at Donald Trump's hush money trial, but will the jury believe the convicted perjurer?

title: When will Donald Trump choose his running mate? The former president's timeline
shortDescription: "I'm really a believer that you do it during the convention," Trump said during radio show

title: Photo of trashed parking lot is from 2020 Trump rally | Fact check
shortDescription: The photo was included in news reports from January 2020 and shows a trashed parking lot after Trump's rally at the Wildwoods Convention Center.

title: Rep. Jamie Raskin asks oil companies about meeting with Trump
shortDescription: Rep. Jamie Raskin sent letters to nine oil companies about Trump's alleged request that the industry spend $1 billion on his campaign's behalf.

title: Kari Lake: Arizona Republican Senate candidate
shortDescription:
Former news anchor Kari Lake 
is the 2024 Republican Senate candidate from Arizona. In 2022, she lost the Arizona race for Governor.

title: Biden announces new Chinese tariffs
shortDescription: President Joe Biden announced that China would have to pay higher tariffs on products imported into the United States to protect workers from "unfair trade practices."

title: Nebraska, West Virginia and Maryland host pivotal primary elections: Recap
shortDescription: A slate of primaries in Maryland, West Virginia and Nebraska on Tuesday set the stage for competitive November general election battles.

title: Scott, Vance, other Republicans attack Cohen and judge in Trump's trial
shortDescription: Donald Trump’s allies are coming to the former president’s defense and attacking witnesses and the judge's daughter in his hush money trial
